ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example

ruleScores.issue: Related section has inconsistent relationship types - lists 'overlaps' with both observability and security agents but also lists 'delegates' and 'consult' with the same agents, creating unclear boundaries
Some enforcement tools are vaguely named: 'Infrastructure Validation', 'Runtime Guards', 'API Middleware' are generic rather than specific tool names like ESLint rules or specific middleware packages

ruleScores.ruleName: Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All required sections present with proper structure
All 7 rules have proper severity and enforcement labels
Rule count of 7 is within the 5-9 bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples
Version 1.0 and last_updated date properly specified
Checklist has exactly 7 items matching the 7 rules
Tool Integration table is complete with all rules mapped
gaps: Related section has conflicting relationship types (overlaps + delegates + consult) with same agents, creating boundary confusion
Enforcement tools use generic names like 'Infrastructure Validation' instead of specific tools like 'AWS Config Rules' or 'Terraform Sentinel'
Boundary statements in related section could be more precise about handoff points
